workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: HELIX Coordination and Reality Control — bounded implementation authorized by Anthony Edgar
workstreams.scope: Repository-only design of the collector recovery evidence contract, reusable validation core, deterministic CLI validator, negative tests, design documentation, and project coordination state. Permitted paths: infra/recovery/collector-recovery-evidence-contract.json, infra/recovery/recovery_evidence_core.py, infra/recovery/validate_recovery_evidence.py, infra/tests/test_collector_recovery_evidence.py, docs/designs/collector-recovery-evidence-schemas.md, .project/active-work.json, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. Protected paths: .github/workflows/**, infra/replacement/**, infra/modules/**, application source, credentials, live evidence, Azure mutation scripts, budgets, alerts, and deployed resources.
workstreams.next_gate: Complete the seven-file bounded implementation, run deterministic local validation, open a draft pull request, obtain exact-head CI, and route the exact passing head for evidence-quality review. Azure authentication and mutation remain prohibited.

resolved_repository_items.title: feat: scaffold Azure network foundation
resolved_repository_items.durable_value: Historical Terraform static-validation, evidence vocabulary, cost-control, and verification-discipline prototype retained in Git history.
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: The branch was never authenticated-planned, deployed, behaviorally verified, or teardown-tested and is not part of current main.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence. It does not prove current guest health, pricing, SKU availability, quota, actual cost, present-day deployment state, snapshot recoverability, or rollback.

current_workstream.claim_boundary: Local validator tests are not GitHub CI. Exact-head CI is required before review.

ci_verification.claim_boundary: CI proves repository consistency only. It does not prove Azure snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, guest health, cost, quota, RBAC restoration, or execution authority.

operations_and_recovery.decision_summary: The v2 contract, validator, negative tests, candidate workflow phase alignment, and PR #28 merge-reality reconciliation resolve the contract-backed rehearsal-teardown finding.
operations_and_recovery.claim_boundary: Approval covers repository design consistency only. It does not authorize Azure execution or satisfy external reviewer independence.

current_evidence_schema_increment.claim_boundary: No review decision exists until an exact passing commit is inspected.

conditions: fresh authenticated subscription-specific meter, SKU availability, and quota preflight before any execution
stop and obtain renewed cost approval if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 4
unconditional stop if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 10
cleanup owner and deadline must be approved before any temporary resource is created
azure_cost.claim_boundary: Planning feasibility only; this is not an actual-cost observation, subscription-specific quotation, budget approval, or Azure execution authorization.

verification_criteria: contract remains design_only and grants no authority
validator rejects false completeness, nested secret leakage, raw command lines, target drift, invalid timestamps, unsupported fields, and unsupported claims
evidence-quality review examines the exact passing head
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: Publish the bounded draft pull request and obtain exact-head CI. Do not add collection commands, authenticate to Azure, activate workflows, mutate resources, restore RBAC, or claim operational recovery.
